task: Create separated Everyone Innocent project and run compile/play/build smoke.
exit_condition: Separated project launches without incubator selection.

task: Lock a 20-30 minute Steam demo loop.
entry_condition: External gate passes and monetization is not weak.
exit_condition: Demo scope lists rooms, evidence routes, replay/trial loop, menu, and feedback flow.

task: Storyboard at least 5 trailer-ready moments from validated player reactions.
entry_condition: First 10 sessions identify readable hook moments.
exit_condition: Trailer shot list maps to in-game capture tasks.

task: Produce and validate required Steam capsules, screenshots, icons, and announce trailer.
entry_condition: External gate passes and art direction is locked.
exit_condition: ValidateSteamAssets.ps1 reports 0 missing required and 0 fail/warn.

task: Revise Steam store copy with external-test wording and price anchor.
entry_condition: External gate passes and monetization signal supports a price.
exit_condition: Store copy, tags, screenshots, trailer, price anchor, and wishlist CTA are ready.

task: Open Steam Direct app only after all store-page gate conditions are true.
entry_condition: External validation, split smoke, demo scope, trailer moments, art direction, and price support are ready.
exit_condition: Steam app created and store page configured privately.

task: Submit public demo build for Steam review after separated-project QA.
entry_condition: Demo build is stable and store page is configured.
exit_condition: Demo review submitted with enough lead time for launch event targets.
